[139:27]And it talked about building a smart city in Gaza after expelling all the residents. This has been the plan.

[139:33]This is what they wanted to do.

[139:35]But I want to talk specifically about what happens next because it's very clear that this is how it will play out

[139:42]Israel was buying time

[139:44]Israel was stalling. They have been receiving their full throated support from the United States with the recently elected Republican government

[139:56]They've gotten most of the alive hostages back and now they are preparing and ready to fully re-enter on the ground in Gaza and finish the job.

[141:58]and speaking in terms of interest, in terms of strategy,

[142:10]why you need to understand the entire scope and breadth of the conflict.

[142:22]I don't just mean since October 7th. I mean, since the very beginning.

[143:44]faction, some militant group of Palestinian radicals.

[143:52]is predicated on total domination of the region,

[143:55]unchallenged domination, that means destroying everybody.

[144:55]economically, diplomatically, and militarily to facilitate Israel's strategic objectives.
